title: Daily Promo Spot — Color-Graded Key Frames, Thumbnail Pack, Cleaned VO & Sizzle Reel
one_line_ask: Take today's exported promo key frames + the provided voice-over, apply one consistent lively color grade across the frames, build a YouTube thumbnail from the hero shot, source a royalty-free music bed, clean the VO, generate a sizzle cut and a content summary, and drop the finished, organized package back in the daily folder — same day.

qc.transcript: Every cup tells a story. Roasted fresh, poured with care, and shared with the people who make our mornings better. Come taste the difference this week.

issues: Aspect ratio appears closer to 2:3 portrait rather than native 16:9 / 1920x1080 landscape frame-grab format — minor crop concern for designer
Slight motion-softness is present but expression freeze is almost too clean for a true mid-sentence frame-grab; candid feel is strong nonetheless
Cool/uneven white balance is present and intentional — no penalty
Background shelf detail is well-blurred but equipment on right edge (grinder/roaster) is partially cropped — acceptable for source asset
panel.text_found: ETHIOPIA LIMU FLORAL CITRUS TEA-LIKE RWANDA NYAMASHEKE BLACK CHERRY COCOA ROUND

issues: Aspect ratio appears closer to 1:1 square crop rather than 16:9 1920x1080 — designer will need to reframe or extend canvas horizontally
Shadows on subject's left side are slightly more underexposed than ideal, potentially clipping detail in the shirt fabric, though within acceptable brief parameters
Burlap sacks in background could read as slightly busy but remain within documentary-style intent
Slight warm color cast on skin tones — minor grading fix needed
Shallow depth of field renders background shelving slightly soft — acceptable for brief but worth noting
Coffee bean cooling tray crops slightly low in frame, could be reframed marginally higher for better product visibility
Slight highlight blowout on large windows (intentional per brief, highlight recovery expected)
Cool afternoon color cast present throughout (intentional per brief, unity cast)
Coffee bag labels have blank/kraft paper tags with no legible text (intentional placeholder)
Large coffee roaster drum at right edge slightly crops the frame but adds authentic environmental context
Background customers are slightly soft/bokeh which is appropriate for depth but reduces environmental documentary sharpness marginally

The cup is slightly off-center to the left, though the latte art itself is well-centered within the cup and is the clear focal point. This is a minor compositional choice for a source asset and does not detract significantly from the overall quality.
Vessel is a handleless bowl/cupping bowl rather than a traditional latte cup, which may not match brief expectations but reads as artisan/specialty coffee context so acceptable
Depth of field is moderate rather than extreme macro shallow DOF specified, though foam micro-texture is well rendered
Wooden counter surface is slightly warm-toned which may require minor cool grade correction to match stated cool mixed light brief
Image appears to be approximately square crop rather than 16:9 1920x1080 aspect ratio — may need reframing or canvas extension for video keyframe use

assets.name: source_clips_for_sizzle.mp4

issues: Espresso stream physics slightly idealized/symmetrical for candid footage
Minor rendering artifact on the portafilter spout junction area

assets.note: ~30s 1920x1088 24fps b-roll montage with native ambient audio: varied roastery shots (beans pouring, pour-over, espresso pulling, owner laughing, wide customers) with subject/scene continuity to the keyframes. Raw source footage the sizzle cut reframes/edits; the brief's raw clip is ~40s. Native audio is ambient (non-speech); the promo VO comes from the separate voiceover track.
